    Our story

    About Tiny Treasures

    Born from a love of beautiful gifting and a passion for welcoming new life — Tiny Treasures is a North Cyprus based newborn hamper studio.

    Crafted with intention

    Every Tiny Treasures hamper starts with a simple idea: that welcoming a new baby deserves something truly special. We believe the best gifts are the ones that show care — in every item chosen, every ribbon tied, and every note tucked inside.

    Based in North Cyprus, we design and assemble each hamper by hand, sourcing soft, safe, and beautiful products for newborns. Whether gifting a friend or celebrating your own little one, we're here to make the moment unforgettable.

    Our hampers are ready-made for ease or fully personalised for meaning — because every baby deserves a gift as unique as they are.

    01
    Handpicked quality
    Every product chosen for safety, softness and beauty.
    02
    Personal touch
    From name tags to colour themes — every hamper feels made just for that baby.
    03
    Gift-ready always
    No wrapping required. Every hamper leaves our studio looking stunning.
    04
    Local with heart
    Proudly made in North Cyprus — a small business with big love for every family.
